name: District Panic
short_description: an action-packed arcade shooter that takes you deep into the heart of a computer under siege.You're the system's last line of defense.
detailed_description:
an action-packed arcade shooter that takes you deep into the heart of a computer under siege. With vibrant visuals and exhilarating gameplay, it's time to charge into the digital depths and defend against the relentless waves of computer bugs!
You're the system's last line of defense.

The main Computer Platform is malfunctioning and you are the hope for restoring it and getting rid of the computer bugs infecting it. Control one out of a selected unique vehicle in a top-down view, exploring infected computers within different Districts.



The Early Access version already includes:
- 4 Characters:
*Clawmarks
*Steel Maverick
*Cyclone
*BOB


- 11 Enemy Types
- 25 Weapons
- 6 Abilities
- 5 Mission types
- 18 Districts/Maps
- Deep progression system of Class, Mods, and Upgrades, that take the shape of a Skill Tree
- Vehicle's and projectile's color customization and personalization
- 2 Different ways to upgrade your Character
- Hilarious Robot companion (with upgrades as well)


- 70+ Song for the amazing game lore

Kill Computer Bugs, Upgrade your stats, add more skills, unlock Abilities, Improve your Character, and have fun with your personal robot Z2!

- New Audio Player
Quick access to game music with the ability to select and switch playlists.
Customize the audio player’s appearance to your liking.

- Mini-Game
Enjoy a new mini-game within the audio player to keep you entertained while listening to music.



A Thank You to Our Players

This game is a labor of love and a work in progress. As you dive into this byte-sized battle, remember that your feedback is invaluable. With each comment and critique, you help shape the future of District Panic. Together, we'll debug the system and create an experience that's truly user-approved.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Turkish
